name: web-sdk-v2.0
description: Web SDK v2.0–v2.4 release notes. The v2-era interface shape is owned by the bitemporal block in 03-v3.0.json (it's the only way an attribute can be replaced by a later seed bundle).

facts.title: v2.0.0 release notes
facts.body:
**v2.0.0** — Modernised browser SDK. ESM-only build, TypeScript-first types, peer-deps bumped to React 17+. New `notifications` module replaces the v1-era `webSdk.inbox` shim. `auth.getUserIdentity()` continues to return a slim `{userId, tenantId, displayName, email}` from the session cache — synchronous, no network call.

**v2.4.0** (latest 2.x) — Performance polish: token-refresh debouncing, smaller cache hot-path. No API changes since 2.0; the surface is stable across the 2.x line.
